SEARCH
Package com.cellsimulation.cli

Class CliRunner

java.lang.Object
com.cellsimulation.cli.CliRunner
public final class CliRunner extends Object
Interactive command-line driver for the simulation engine.

Exposes a small REPL that accepts text commands (help, print, stats, init, add, remove, random, step, play, set, neighborhood, save, load, reset, quit). The runner owns a single SimulationEngine instance, which it rewires when the user runs init (to change the grid dimensions) or load (to replace the current engine with one read from disk).

The class is fully independent from JavaFX, so the simulation can be demonstrated on any machine with only a JDK installed. The save and load commands are delegated to a SaveService and persist the engine state in a binary file on disk using Java native serialization.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    CliRunner()
    Builds a new CLI runner wired to a default engine: a 20x20 bounded grid, the default SimulationSettings and the orthogonal neighborhood strategy.

  • Constructor Details

    • CliRunner

      public CliRunner()
      Builds a new CLI runner wired to a default engine: a 20x20 bounded grid, the default SimulationSettings and the orthogonal neighborhood strategy. The welcome banner is printed by main(String[]), not by this constructor.

  • Method Details

    • main

      public static void main(String[] args)
      Entry point of the CLI front-end.

      Builds a new CliRunner with the default configuration, prints the welcome banner and starts the REPL loop. Command-line arguments are ignored.

      Parameters:
      args - ignored
